author: y4rr
content: Plan: The norm modules in nn/norm.rs have their own forward/backward implementations that download GPU tensors to CPU. However, the core autograd layer (grad_fns/) already has GPU-dispatched layernorm with a dedicated PTX kernel (backend.layernorm_f32 forward, backend.layernorm_backward_f32 backward). Need to verify whether nn::LayerNorm's forward calls the core layernorm op (which has GPU dispatch) or does its own CPU computation. If it does its own computation, refactor it to delegate to the core op.
